prompt: How do I set up strong_migrations in my Rails app so it automatically catches unsafe migrations in CI before they hit production?
assertions: Shows how to add the gem to Gemfile
Shows the rails generate strong_migrations:install command
Mentions target_version to match production Postgres version
Explains that running rails db:migrate in CI automatically catches unsafe migrations (deterministic gate)
Explains the safety_assured escape hatch and warns against misuse
